subject: chore(sw): precache apple-touch-icon.png
body:
iOS fetches the apple-touch-icon when a user adds the PWA to their home
screen. Precaching it in the install step (alongside icon-192 and
icon-512) ensures the app shell is complete offline from first visit.

Tags: pwa, service-worker, icons
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
